description:
Highlights

  • - Spacious Size: This large ferret cage offers your pet height to climb for fun and exercise. A hanging hammock is included for a comfortable nap spot at the top. The four-tier layout allows a big, cozy living space.
  • - Easy to move: With four smooth-rolling wheels, this rabbit cage glides effortlessly across your home, whether you're chasing sunlight, cleaning up, or simply rearranging. Portability meets convenience for stress-free pet care.
  • - Easy to Clean: A pull-out bottom tray makes cleaning this small animal cage simple and quick, and the two doors provide quick and easy access to reach in and feed or pet your furry pals.
  • - Robust: With a strong steel wire, this chinchilla cage provides a stable structure, a pleasant, well-ventilated home, and a see-through design to keep easy track of your furry friends.
  • - Small Animal Cage Information: Overall Dimensions: 20.5" L x 20.5" W x 44.75" H. Provides a safe and secure house for Ferrets, Chinchillas, Kittens, and Sugar Gliders. Easy assembly with the clear manual

Features:

  • - Rolls on wheels for easy moving
  • - Includes a bottom tray, features bedding, and is easily removed for cleaning
  • - 4 tiers add space in height and climbable fun
  • - 2 doors for easy access to feed and pet the animal
  • - Ramp and hanging hammock are included
  • - Constructed with steel for strength
  • - Suitable for ferrets, chinchillas, sugar gliders, kittens and other small pets
  • - Assembly required

Specification:

  • - Color: White
  • - Material: Steel, PP, Nylon
  • - Overall Dimension: 20.5"L x 20.5"W x 44.75"H
  • - Door Size: 9"L x 8.75"
  • - Platform Size: 19.75"L x 9.75"
  • - Ramp Size: 12.5"L x 5"
  • - Tray Size: 20.5"L x 19.25"W x 2.25"H
  • - Cross wire spacing: 0.5"
  • - Item Label: D51-153V00LG
  • - Note: Not suitable for hamster

Package Includes:

  • 1x Pet Habitat
  • 1 x Manual
